import asyncio


async def process_upload(file_path: str):
    task = asyncio.create_task(validate_file(file_path))
    data = await read_file(file_path)
    await save_to_database(data)


async def sync_all_products():
    products = await fetch_all_products()
    for product in products:
        asyncio.create_task(update_product(product))


async def send_batch_notifications(user_ids: list, message: str):
    for user_id in user_ids:
        asyncio.create_task(send_notification(user_id, message))


async def background_cleanup():
    asyncio.create_task(delete_temp_files())
    asyncio.create_task(expire_sessions())
    asyncio.create_task(compact_database())
